data.title: XRP Price Shows Growing Excitement As Brad Garlinghouse Discloses SEC Agreement
data.description:
XRP price enjoyed an extra boost of bullish momentum in the last 24 hours. The cryptocurrency concluded the week by regaining most of the losses that it experienced in the first half. One of the main reasons for the bullish expectations on XRP price action is the favorable conclusion of the SEC lawsuit against Ripple
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/04/14/xrp-price-shows-growing-excitement-as-brad-garlinghouse-discloses-sec-agreement/

data.title: DAgenticO Framework Aims to Redefine DAO Functionality
data.description: According to Odaily, the concept of 'DAgenticO' is set to transform the traditional understanding of Decentralized Autonomous Organizations (DAOs). Under this new framework, DAOs will evolve from entities focused on coordinating production relationships to becoming efficient productivity organizations. This transformation will be facilitated through decentralized social media and social payment infrastructures, enhancing interaction with users.

data.title: Analysis of MANTRA Token Distribution Reveals Early Trading Patterns
data.description: According to Foresight News, data from Glassnode indicates that the distribution of MANTRA tokens during early trading periods did not show concentrated holdings. The largest accumulation area below the current spot price is at $0.05, with approximately 26 million OM tokens, formed in May 2022. This is significantly lower than the largest cluster area at $6.66, which holds around 197 million OM tokens. This suggests that long-term early holders are not maintaining substantial positions at the current price level.

data.title: Trump tariff turmoil sees global crypto funds shed another $795 million in weekly outflows: CoinShares
data.description:
Trump's tariff activity continues to weigh on sentiment toward the asset class, Head of Research James Butterfill said.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/350697/trump-tariff-turmoil-crypto-funds-outflows?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Dora Factory proposes a centralized fully automated organization
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News "Fully Automated Organization" (DAgenticO) redefines DAO. Under this framework, DAO will evolve from a subject that exists to coordinate production relations to an organization that provides efficient productivity and interacts with users through decentralized social media and social payment infrastructure.

data.title: MANTRA staking address sends 38 million OM to Binance cold wallet, equivalent to $26.96 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to OnchainLens monitoring, 2 hours ago, the MANTRA DAO staking wallet sent 38 million OMs (approximately US$26.96 million) to the Binance cold wallet.

data.title: Google to enforce MiCA rules for crypto ads in Europe starting April 23
data.description:
Google will begin enforcing stricter advertising policies for cryptocurrency services in Europe under the Markets in Crypto-Assets (MiCA) framework, the company said in a recent policy update. The move could be a “double-edged sword” for regulation that may prevent initial coin offering (ICO) frauds, but risks further enforcement gaps, according to legal advisers. Starting April 23, cryptocurrency exchanges and crypto wallet advertising in Europe must be licensed under Europe’s MiCA framework or under the Crypto Asset Service Provider (CASP) regulation. Crypto advertisers on Google will also have to comply with “local legal requirements,” including “national-level restrictions or requirements beyond MiCA” and be “certified by Google,” according to a March 24 Google policy announcement
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/google-crypto-ads-mica-europe-compliance-policy?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: USA: Clean Cloud Act proposes emission limits for miners by 2035
data.description:
A new U. S. bill would require mining and AI companies to progressively reduce emissions.
source: https://atlas21.com/mining-clean-cloud-act-proposes-emission-limits-for-miners-by-2035/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=mining-clean-cloud-act-proposes-emission-limits-for-miners-by-2035

data.title: Gate.io Chief Business Officer Kevin went to Milan to witness Inter Milan's peak moment
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: Kevin Lee, Chief Business Officer of Gate.io, went to Milan as a brand spokesperson and watched the match between Inter Milan and Cagliari Football Club. As the official sleeve sponsor of Inter Milan, Gate.io achieved full brand exposure at the San Siro Stadium.
The LED screens on the side of the stadium and the central main screen displayed the Gate.io brand logo throughout the whole process. The giant Gate.io logo occupied the center of the stadium before the game and during the halftime break. The VIP box and garage entrance, the external gate of the stadium and the facade of the Inter Milan Museum were all paved with brand logos. The brand vision was strong throughout the event. Gate.io and Inter Milan share a global vision and innovative genes, and will jointly explore a new model of Web3 and sports cooperation.

data.title: Laser Digital responds to OM crash: Did not participate in sell-off, core OM investment remains locked
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Laser Digital posted on X: "We would like to directly respond to recent speculation about Laser Digital's involvement in OM (Mantra) price fluctuations. Laser has no connection with the recent price drop of OM. The claims on social media that Laser is associated with "investor selling" are false and misleading. Some OM on-chain transfer records related to Laser wallets are publicly marked. We clearly state: Laser has not deposited any OM tokens with OKX. The wallet mentioned in connection with OKX is not Laser's wallet. We are consistent with our partners, and our core OM investment remains locked. We have no interest in putting pressure on the token or undermining the stability of the project. Transparency is important."
